situational_context: Running comeback well consolidated at day 79 (18 runs since May 3). Benjamin on vacation in Saint-Malo (Jul 12-26), running on coastal trails. Distances progressed to 8 km (Run #16, Jul 15) with demonstrated tolerance. VO2max running improved to 42 (from 40.6 at last digest Jun 14, 38.3 at comeback start). HRV recovered: 7d avg 40 ms (up from 35 on Jun 14), all BALANCED this week. RHR 48 bpm (down from 50). ACWR 1.49 — just under 1.50 comeback ceiling, driven by 4 runs in 8 days at Saint-Malo. Chronic load building at 25.1 (up from 17.5). Sleep excellent on vacation (8.04h avg). No e-bike commuting while away. Weight data limited (single reading 103.67 kg, Jun 21). No new labs; Vitamin D retest overdue.

recommendations.text: ACWR at 1.49 — rest Tue-Wed to let acute load decay before Run #19 Thursday. After Run #16 (load 57) drops out of the 7-day window on Jul 22, ACWR should drop to ~1.2-1.3. Do not add unplanned sessions.
recommendations.measurable: ACWR <= 1.40 by Thursday Jul 23 before Run #19

recommendations.text: Consolidate 8 km long run — Run #16 (8.03 km) was absorbed cleanly. Run #20 Saturday should match this distance; push to 9 km only if tissue feedback is clean and readiness >= 50.
recommendations.measurable: Run #20 completed at 8 km with no post-run pain >24h

recommendations.text: Vitamin D retest overdue — was due July 2026 (8 weeks post-comeback). Schedule blood panel after return to Paris (Jul 27+). Target >= 40 ng/mL.
recommendations.measurable: Lab order placed within 2 weeks of returning to Paris

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if ACWR remains > 1.45 after 2 rest days (by Jul 23)
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 1.49; should decay as Run #16 load drops out of 7d window
Last reading Jun 21 (103.67 kg). Pesee scheduled Jul 26.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if readiness < 40 on Run #19 or Run #20 morning
